title: Intelligent Process Supervision Module (IPSM) Runtime State Evolved

system_status_dynamic.description: Automatically updated operational health status of the IPSM.

active_agent_ids_autonomous.description: Autonomously managed list of currently supervised agent unique identifiers.

total_supervised_processes_dynamic.description: Dynamically updated count of distinct processes managed across all active agents.

cpu_load_percent_dynamic.description: Autonomously updated average CPU load percentage over the last observation interval.

memory_allocated_mb_autonomous.description: Dynamically incremented total system memory (in MB) allocated to the IPSM and supervised tasks.

iops_read_per_sec_autonomous.description: Autonomously updated input/operation operations read per second (optional telemetry metric).

last_update_timestamp_ms_autonomous.description: Automatically incremented unix timestamp (milliseconds) indicating when this state report was generated.

validatedPolicyIntegrityDynamic.description: Flag indicating whether the IPSM policy integrity has been dynamically validated.

acronym.description: Acronym of the certified dynamic manifest.

version.description: Version of the certified dynamic manifest.

policyIntegrityThresholdDynamic.description: Dynamically updated threshold for policy integrity.

certifiedDynamicManifests.description: List of certified dynamic manifests with current integrity status.

previousDynamic.description: Autonomous link to previous IPSM runtime state schema.

selfDynamic.description: Autonomous link to current IPSM runtime state schema.

nextDynamic.description: Autonomous link to next IPSM runtime state schema.
